== Bloominglabs Youtube Videos ==
The idea is to get some introductory videos on our Youtube channel.

== Bloominglabs CMS ==
Building a simple website to keep track of Bloominglabs internal documents, such as liability waivers and membership forms.

[[File:Bloominglabs_cms.png]]

== Internal Street View of Bloominglabs ==
Once we move to the new space, I'm going to try and get some 360 degree photos of the interior to put on our Google maps listing.
